x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for HAM is the foundational plugin enabling all AI capabilities for hardware asset lifecycle management including refresh recommendations and disposal insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware asset lifecycle recommendations, refresh planning, and disposal insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware lifecycle management and refresh planning are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is not active. All AI-powered hardware asset management capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_9bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c76
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist for HAM is the foundational plugin enabling all AI capabilities for hardware asset lifecycle management including refresh recommendations and disposal insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware asset lifecycle recommendations, refresh planning, and disposal insights are available." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_now_assist_ham"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM is active", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is active. AI-powered hardware lifecycle management and refresh planning are available." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Now Assist for HAM not found or inactive", finding: "Now Assist for HAM is not active. All AI-powered hardware asset management capabilities are unavailable without this plugin." }; })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HAM</module><number>CHK0000608</number><order>100</order><remediation_guidance>Activate Now Assist for Hardware Asset Management via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>9bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c76</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_9bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c76</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>

sys_audit_delete.display_value: Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Now Assist for HAM Plugin Status
